hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】Bittensor 联合创始人表示，比特币的计算能力使排名前 100 的超级计算机相形见绌 60 万倍；【FINANCE】美联储主席沃什在央行任命首批员工，其中包括《Project 2025》作者；【WORLD】真主党无人机如何改变以色列在黎巴嫩的战略。

items.title: Bitcoin’s compute power dwarfs top 100 supercomputers by 600k times, says Bittensor co-founder
items.summary: Ala Shaabana explains how using Bitcoin network’s coordinate-and-reward playbook can bust open corporate monopolies on AI.
items.title_zh: Bittensor 联合创始人表示，比特币的计算能力使排名前 100 的超级计算机相形见绌 60 万倍
items.summary_zh: Ala Shaabana 解释了如何使用比特币网络的协调和奖励策略来打破人工智能领域的开放企业垄断。

items.title: Fed Chair Warsh makes first hires at central bank, including ‘Project 2025’ author
items.summary: The new Fed chair has made his first hires. One wrote the Fed chapter in conservative policy blueprint "Project 2025."
items.title_zh: 美联储主席沃什在央行任命首批员工，其中包括《Project 2025》作者
items.summary_zh: 新任美联储主席已经任命了他的第一批人选。其中一位在保守派政策蓝图“2025 年计划”中写下了美联储的章节。

items.title: How Hezbollah Drones Changed Israel’s Strategy in Lebanon
items.summary: An Israeli campaign that started with high hopes has devolved into a kind of impasse, with Hezbollah looking more capable than it did when the war began.
items.title_zh: 真主党无人机如何改变以色列在黎巴嫩的战略
items.summary_zh: 以色列的一场原本满怀希望的战役已经陷入僵局，真主党看起来比战争开始时更有能力。

items.title: Greg Abel just made his first big deal as Berkshire CEO. Why Warren Buffett is happy
items.summary: Berkshire's purchase of homebuilder Taylor Morrison gives the conglomerate a larger foothold in housing and appears to have been struck at a bargain valuation.
items.title_zh: 格雷格·阿贝尔刚刚完成了他作为伯克希尔首席执行官的第一笔大交易。为什么沃伦·巴菲特很高兴
items.summary_zh: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司收购房屋建筑商泰勒·莫里森(Taylor Morrison)，使该集团在房地产领域获得了更大的立足点，而且估值似乎很便宜。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Iran Targets Neighbors as U.S. Condemns ‘Aggressive’ Strikes
items.summary: Iran aimed at Bahrain and Kuwait, but the attacks were shot down or failed, the U.S. military said. The U.S. launched what it called “self-defense” strikes in Iran.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：伊朗以邻国为目标，美国谴责“侵略性”袭击
items.summary_zh: 美国军方表示，伊朗的目标是巴林和科威特，但袭击被击落或失败。美国对伊朗发动了所谓的“自卫”袭击。

items.title: Standard Chartered says Strategy’s bitcoin sale may mark start of ETH outperformance
items.summary: Standard Chartered said Ethereum DATs have an advantage over bitcoin DATs because ETH's staking yield means they do not need to sell ETH.
items.title_zh: 渣打银行表示，Strategy 的比特币销售可能标志着 ETH 表现优异的开始
items.summary_zh: 渣打银行表示，以太坊 DAT 比比特币 DAT 有优势，因为 ETH 的质押收益率意味着他们不需要出售 ETH。

items.title: US and Iran launch new strikes as ceasefire negotiations stall
items.summary: US launches fresh strikes on Iran and an oil tanker as Tehran says it attacked US air bases in the Gulf.
items.title_zh: 停火谈判陷入僵局，美国和伊朗发动新的打击
items.summary_zh: 德黑兰称袭击了美国在海湾的空军基地，美国对伊朗和一艘油轮发动了新的袭击。

items.title: Russia Launches Deadly Strikes on Kyiv After Threatening Ukraine for a Week
items.summary: Moscow’s repeated warnings of a major strike, combined with the delay before it happened, seemed intended to inflict a psychological toll on the Ukrainian capital.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯在威胁乌克兰一周后对基辅发动致命袭击
items.summary_zh: 莫斯科一再发出重大罢工的警告，再加上罢工发生前的拖延，似乎是为了给乌克兰首都造成心理打击。

items.title: Tom Lee predicts ether will hit $250,000 as corporate validators take over network control
items.summary: The Bitmine chairman said DeFi and AI could push the Ethereum network's value into the multi-trillion range, making current prices “future optionality at a discount”.
items.title_zh: Tom Lee 预测随着企业验证者接管网络控制权，以太坊价格将达到 25 万美元
items.summary_zh: 这位 Bitmine 董事长表示，DeFi 和人工智能可以将以太坊网络的价值推向数万亿美元的范围，使当前价格成为“未来的折扣选择”。

items.title: Coinbase investing into stablecoin reserves ETF issued by ProShares
items.summary: The fund, called ProShares GENIUS Money Market ETF, has $22 billion in assets under management and launched this year.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 投资 ProShares 发行的稳定币储备 ETF
items.summary_zh: 该基金名为 ProShares GENIUS Money Market ETF，管理资产达 220 亿美元，于今年推出。

items.title: Strive adds 2,500 BTC to treasury as Saylor’s Strategy sells
items.summary: In an initiation note, Benchmark said the company has "one of the most differentiated capital structures in the bitcoin treasury sector."
items.title_zh: 随着 Saylor 策略的出售，Strive 向金库增加了 2,500 BTC
items.summary_zh: Benchmark 在一份启动说明中表示，该公司拥有“比特币金库行业中最具差异化的资本结构之一”。

items.title: ‘Materially softer demand’: Bitcoin hits two-month low below $69,000 amid institutional outflow streak, fading onchain interest
items.summary: Bitcoin fell below $69,000 to a two-month low as ETF outflows hit $3.45 billion over 11 days, along with $742 million in liquidations.
items.title_zh: “需求大幅疲软”：由于机构资金连续流出，链上兴趣减弱，比特币触及两个月低点，低于 69,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 由于 ETF 资金流出在 11 天内达到 34.5 亿美元，以及 7.42 亿美元的清算，比特币跌破 69,000 美元，创两个月低点。

items.title: Israel strikes southern Lebanon but partial truce with Hezbollah appears to hold
items.summary: Israel continues its campaign in the south, though has not struck Beirut after a deal announced by the US.
items.title_zh: 以色列袭击黎巴嫩南部，但与真主党的部分休战似乎得以维持
items.summary_zh: 以色列继续在南部发动攻势，但在美国宣布达成协议后并未袭击贝鲁特。

items.title: Putin remains uncompromising on Ukraine, but is public discourse on war changing in Russia?
items.summary: Russia is intensifying attacks in Ukraine but more than four years of war are causing concern even among Putin loyalists.
items.title_zh: 普京在乌克兰问题上依然不妥协，但俄罗斯关于战争的公众言论是否正在发生变化？
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯正在加紧对乌克兰的袭击，但四年多的战争甚至引起了普京忠诚者的担忧。

items.title: Bombs Raining Down on Ukraine Can’t Hide Signs of Russia’s Faltering War
items.summary: The war has not been going the Kremlin’s way, with battleground losses and growing casualties. With fiercer strikes, Moscow hopes to gain a better position for negotiations.
items.title_zh: 炸弹如雨点般落在乌克兰并不能掩盖俄罗斯战争摇摇欲坠的迹象
items.summary_zh: 战争并没有按照克里姆林宫的意愿进行，战场上的损失和伤亡人数不断增加。通过更猛烈的打击，莫斯科希望在谈判中获得更好的地位。

items.title: Protests Grow in Albania Over Kushner-Linked Project
items.summary: Plans for luxury resorts on the Adriatic Sea have long worried environmentalists. The developments are now a flashpoint for broader frustrations with the government.
items.title_zh: 阿尔巴尼亚对库什纳相关项目的抗议活动日益增多
items.summary_zh: 亚得里亚海豪华度假村的计划长期以来一直令环保人士担忧。这些事态发展现在成为人们对政府更广泛不满的导火索。

items.title: Murder of Henry Nowak, Who Was Handcuffed by Police While Dying, Fuels Outrage in UK
items.summary: The authorities in Britain are investigating police officers who handcuffed a student, Henry Nowak, while he was dying, in a case that been increasingly politicized.
items.title_zh: 亨利·诺瓦克在临死时被警察戴上手铐谋杀，在英国激起了愤怒
items.summary_zh: 英国当局正在调查在学生亨利·诺瓦克（Henry Nowak）临终时给他戴上手铐的警察，此案日益政治化。

items.title: UK House of Lords committee calls on Bank of England to reconsider proposed stablecoin restrictions
items.summary: The Bank of England proposed limits of 20,000 pounds per coin for individuals and 10 million pounds for businesses.
items.title_zh: 英国上议院委员会呼吁英格兰银行重新考虑拟议的稳定币限制
items.summary_zh: 英格兰银行建议个人每枚硬币的发行限额为 20,000 英镑，企业每枚硬币的发行限额为 1,000 万英镑。

items.title: U.S. sanctions Iranian crypto exchanges in ongoing war against the country
items.summary: OFAC said it was blacklisting Nobitex and three other Iranian exchanges, as well as a few executives, citing links to terror and other crimes.
items.title_zh: 美国在针对该国的持续战争中制裁伊朗加密货币交易所
items.summary_zh: OFAC 表示，它已将 Nobitex 和其他三个伊朗交易所以及几名高管列入黑名单，理由是与恐怖和其他犯罪行为有关。

items.title: Crypto derivatives activity slumps to late-2023 levels, but US perp market opportunity emerges
items.summary: The composition of that volume remains heavily concentrated among a handful of exchanges, with Binance maintaining its dominant share.
items.title_zh: 加密货币衍生品活动下滑至 2023 年末水平，但美国永续市场机会出现
items.summary_zh: 该交易量的构成仍然主要集中在少数交易所，币安保持其主导份额。

items.title: Ethena taps Anchorage for secure offchain collateral in institutional lending push
items.summary: Ethena began pivoting toward overcollateralized institutional lending in April as part of a major overhaul of USDe reserves.
items.title_zh: Ethena 在机构贷款推动中利用安克雷奇提供安全的链下抵押品
items.summary_zh: 作为 USDe 储备重大改革的一部分，Ethena 从 4 月份开始转向超额抵押机构贷款。

items.title: Sens. Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren push Labor Dept. to scrap proposed rule that brings crypto into 401(k) plans
items.summary: Sens. Warren and Sanders are pressing the DOL to strike down a proposed rule that would open up 401(k) retirement plans to crypto.
items.title_zh: 参议员伯尼·桑德斯 (Bernie Sanders) 和伊丽莎白·沃伦 (Elizabeth Warren) 敦促劳工部废除将加密货币纳入 401(k) 计划的拟议规则
items.summary_zh: 参议员沃伦和桑德斯正在向劳工部施压，要求其否决一项将 401(k) 退休计划开放给加密货币的拟议规则。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bonk (BONK)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #114.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bonk (BONK)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 114。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #28.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：LAB (LAB)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 28。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Lighter (LIT)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #122.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：打火机 (LIT)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 122。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #117.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 117 名。

items.title: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
items.title_zh: 专业化战胜规模：大多数人工智能采购决策忽视的战略变量

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: Nvidia, Meta and SLB rank among top companies in adopting AI, new study says
items.summary: The AI-Driven Enterprise Institute released new research that breaks down the degree to which S&P 500 companies are adopting AI compared with their peers.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明，Nvidia、Meta 和 SLB 在采用人工智能方面名列前茅
items.summary_zh: 人工智能驱动企业研究所发布了一项新研究，详细分析了标准普尔 500 强公司与同行相比采用人工智能的程度。

items.title: Coinbase backs Ethena ahead of savings product launch for exchange's 100 million users
items.summary: Coinbase Ventures, the exchange's venture arm, bought Ethena tokens on the open market as the protocol is set to roll out a Coinbase integration next week.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 支持 Ethena 为交易所 1 亿用户推出储蓄产品
items.summary_zh: 该交易所的风险投资部门 Coinbase Ventures 在公开市场上购买了 Ethena 代币，该协议将于下周推出 Coinbase 整合。

items.title: Galaxy enters institutional prediction markets with $10 million Arca trade
items.summary: The digital asset firm launched OTC prediction markets trading for institutions and completed a $10 million trade tied to U.S. crypto legislation with hedge fund Arca.
items.title_zh: Galaxy 通过 1000 万美元的 Arca 交易进入机构预测市场
items.summary_zh: 这家数字资产公司为机构推出了场外预测市场交易，并与对冲基金 Arca 完成了与美国加密立法相关的 1000 万美元交易。

items.title: Bitcoin set for 'choppy summer' as capital chases high-flying AI stocks, K33 says
items.summary: The firm still views bitcoin as undervalued relative to equities, but says investors are rotating into AI stocks as the opportunity cost of missing gains by holding BTC is too high.
items.title_zh: K33 表示，随着资本追逐高涨的人工智能股票，比特币将迎来“波涛汹涌的夏天”
items.summary_zh: 该公司仍然认为比特币相对于股票被低估，但表示投资者正在转向人工智能股票，因为持有比特币错过收益的机会成本太高。

items.title: Bitcoin faces an 'identity crisis' and DeFi devs need to stop acting like tech bros
items.summary: Solstice Labs CEO Ben Nadareski says developers must act like financial managers to win back institutional trust amid ongoing security exploits.
items.title_zh: 比特币面临“身份危机”，DeFi 开发者需要停止像科技兄弟一样行事
items.summary_zh: Solstice Labs 首席执行官 Ben Nadareski 表示，开发人员必须像财务经理一样行事，才能在持续的安全漏洞中赢得机构信任。

items.title: Coinbase invests in Ethena via open market purchase of ENA, flags new partnership
items.summary: Ethena said the two companies have also become partners "to grow onchain finance and savings products."
items.title_zh: Coinbase 通过公开市场购买 ENA 投资 Ethena，标志着新的合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: Ethena 表示，两家公司还成为“发展链上金融和储蓄产品”的合作伙伴。

items.title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
items.summary: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report explores how Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation.
items.title_zh: Codex 正在成为每个人的生产力工具
items.summary_zh: 知识工作的下一个时代报告探讨了 Codex 如何通过人工智能驱动的研究、数据分析、工作流程自动化和内容创建来改变生产力。

items.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
items.summary: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation
items.title_zh: OpenAI 前沿模型和 Codex 现已在 AWS 上提供
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 前沿模型和 Codex 现已在 AWS 上普遍提供，为企业提供了一条通过他们已使用的 AWS 环境、控制和采购工作流程使用 OpenAI 进行构建的新途径。客户可以开始使用 AWS 上的 OpenAI 并更快地完成评估

items.title: Strengthening societal resilience with Rosalind Biodefense
items.summary: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners advancing biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI.
items.title_zh: 通过 Rosalind Biodefense 增强社会复原力
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 Rosalind Biodefense，为经过审查的开发人员和美国政府合作伙伴扩大对 GPT-Rosalind 的可信访问，通过前沿 AI 推进生物防御、公共卫生和大流行病防范。

items.title: Introducing Mellum2: A 12B Mixture-of-Experts Model by JetBrains
items.title_zh: Mellum2 简介：JetBrains 的 12B 专家混合模型

items.title: Welcome NVIDIA Cosmos 3: The First Open Omni-model for Physical AI Reasoning and Action
items.title_zh: 欢迎 NVIDIA Cosmos 3：首个用于物理 AI 推理和行动的开放式全模型

items.title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
items.title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型系列

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
items.title_zh: AI 模式如何改变美国人们的搜索方式
items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Traders say Karen Bass and Spencer Pratt will advance to runoff in high-profile L.A. mayoral race
items.summary: Los Angeles voters go to the polls Tuesday. If no candidate receives more than 50%, the top-two vote getters will advance to a November runoff.
items.title_zh: 交易员称凯伦·巴斯和斯宾塞·普拉特将在备受瞩目的洛杉矶市长竞选中晋级决选
items.summary_zh: 洛杉矶选民周二前往投票站。如果没有候选人获得超过 50% 的支持，得票最多的两名候选人将进入 11 月的决选。

items.title: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon says markets are in 'greed' mode as AI companies seek billions
items.summary: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon's comments come as investors prepare for what will be one of the busiest periods for equity issuance in years.
items.title_zh: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门表示，随着人工智能公司寻求数十亿美元的投资，市场正处于“贪婪”模式
items.summary_zh: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门发表此番言论之际，投资者正在为多年来股票发行最繁忙的时期之一做准备。

items.title: Polymarket closes its first block trade as prediction markets push for Wall Street adoption
items.summary: Prediction market platforms have increasingly looked to institutional traders, not individual ones, as the next venue for growth.
items.title_zh: 随着预测市场推动华尔街采用，Polymarket 完成首笔大宗交易
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台越来越多地将机构交易者而非个人交易者视为下一个增长场所。

items.title: Individual traders drove Kalshi’s rise. Now, it’s going for Wall Street
items.summary: In a series of moves in 2026, the prediction market platform in the U.S. is working to make its event contracts more attractive to institutional trading.
items.title_zh: 个体交易员推动了卡尔希的上涨。现在，它正走向华尔街
items.summary_zh: 在 2026 年的一系列举措中，美国预测市场平台正在努力使其事件合约对机构交易更具吸引力。

items.title: Rubio odds for GOP 2028 nominee close to overtaking Vance on Kalshi
items.summary: Vice President Vance has seen his odds slip since the start of the year, as the secretary of State's chances have been buoyed by international conflicts.
items.title_zh: 卢比奥获得共和党 2028 年提名的可能性接近超越万斯
items.summary_zh: 自今年年初以来，副总统万斯的胜算一直在下降，因为国际冲突增加了国务卿的机会。

items.title: 'Disrupted or dead': AI is crushing a generation of startups built before ChatGPT
items.summary: The AI boom that has funneled more than $250 billion into OpenAI and Anthropic has left hundreds of startups built before ChatGPT's arrival in 2022 stranded.
items.title_zh: “要么颠覆，要么消亡”：人工智能正在摧毁 ChatGPT 之前建立的一代初创公司
items.summary_zh: 人工智能热潮为 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 注入了超过 2500 亿美元，这使得在 2022 年 ChatGPT 到来之前建立的数百家初创公司陷入困境。

items.title: Nvidia picks Unitree for humanoid robot platform as Chinese startup eyes IPO
items.summary: The U.S. chipmaker's first publicly available humanoid robotics system will use humanoids from Chinese startup Unitree.
items.title_zh: 中国初创公司考虑首次公开募股，英伟达选择 Unitree 作为人形机器人平台
items.summary_zh: 这家美国芯片制造商的第一个公开的人形机器人系统将使用中国初创公司 Unitree 的人形机器人。

items.title: 'They'll fix the building, but not our souls': Sleepy Kyiv neighbourhood hit in Russian strike
items.summary: Scenes of devastation greet residents emerging from underground shelters after a major Russian attack.
items.title_zh: “他们会修复建筑物，但不会修复我们的灵魂”：沉睡的基辅社区在俄罗斯罢工中遭到袭击
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯发生重大袭击后，从地下避难所出来的居民看到了满目疮痍的景象。

items.title: British couple lose Iran jail sentence appeal, family says
items.summary: Lindsay and Craig Foreman were arrested in January 2025 during a global motorbike journey.
items.title_zh: 家人称英国夫妇伊朗判刑上诉败诉
items.summary_zh: Lindsay 和 Craig Foreman 于 2025 年 1 月在一次全球摩托车旅行中被捕。

items.title: Microsoft says new quantum chip 1,000 times more reliable than predecessor
items.summary: The tech giant predicts it will have a quantum computer that can solve commercially useful problems by the end of the decade.
items.title_zh: 微软称新量子芯片比前代芯片可靠 1000 倍
items.summary_zh: 这家科技巨头预测，到本世纪末，它将拥有一台可以解决商业有用问题的量子计算机。

items.title: Mayor cancels DR Congo friendly with Chile in Spain over Ebola concern
items.summary: DR Congo's international friendly against Chile in Spain next week is cancelled after authorities raise health concerns over the Ebola outbreak in the African nation.
items.title_zh: 因埃博拉疫情，市长取消了刚果民主共和国与智利在西班牙的友谊赛
items.summary_zh: 在当局对非洲国家埃博拉疫情提出健康担忧后，刚果民主共和国下周在西班牙对阵智利的国际友谊赛被取消。

items.title: Mysteriously missing congressman wins primary after Trump endorsement
items.summary: Republican lawmaker Tom Kean Jr has not been seen in Washington or his New Jersey district for several months.
items.title_zh: 神秘失踪的国会议员在特朗普支持后赢得初选
items.summary_zh: 共和党议员小汤姆·基恩已经几个月没有出现在华盛顿或其新泽西选区了。

items.title: Watch: Man attacked by bear at steel works in Japan
items.summary: Watch: Man attacked by bear at steel works in Japan

items.summary_zh: 观看：日本钢铁厂男子遭熊袭击

items.title: Maga influencer admits London Tube station assault
items.summary: Melissa Rein Lively accepted a caution, while an assault by beating charge against her was withdrawn.
items.title_zh: Maga 影响者承认伦敦地铁站袭击事件
items.summary_zh: 梅丽莎·雷因·莱弗利接受了警告，而对她的殴打指控也被撤回。

items.title: U.S. Ebola Unit Plans in Kenya, Subject of Protests, Suffers New Setback From Court Ruling
items.summary: The court further delayed the Trump administration’s proposed quarantine unit for Americans exposed to the virus. The plan has sparked angry protests in Kenya.
items.title_zh: 美国在肯尼亚的埃博拉部队计划因抗议而遭受法院裁决的新挫折
items.summary_zh: 法院进一步推迟了特朗普政府提议的针对接触该病毒的美国人的隔离设施。该计划在肯尼亚引发了愤怒的抗议。

items.title: The New Zealand Parakeet Pair That Are Saving Their Species
items.summary: There are about 450 orange-fronted parakeets left in the world. Super breeders Nacho and Trixie are doing their best to bolster the population.
items.title_zh: 新西兰鹦鹉对正在拯救自己的物种
items.summary_zh: 世界上仅存约 450 只橙额鹦鹉。超级饲养员纳乔和特里克西正在尽最大努力增加种群数量。

items.title: U.S. Was Asked to Blacklist Colombian Cartel Gold. It Was Also Buying It.
items.summary: The request for sanctions, from Colombia’s defense minister, shows failures at both ends of the supply chain for illegal gold.
items.title_zh: 美国被要求将哥伦比亚卡特尔黄金列入黑名单。它也在购买它。
items.summary_zh: 哥伦比亚国防部长提出的制裁请求显示了非法黄金供应链两端的失败。

items.title: Trump Again Refers to Canada as the ’51st State’ Hours Before Trade Talks
items.summary: The Canadian trade minister met with the U.S. Trade Representative on Tuesday.
items.title_zh: 特朗普在贸易谈判前几小时再次称加拿大为“第51个州”
items.summary_zh: 加拿大贸易部长周二会见了美国贸易代表。

items.title: Hyperliquid predicted 80% of oil move before traditional exchanges opened, says expert report
items.summary: TD Securities says "perpetual futures" are exploding beyond crypto as platforms like Hyperliquid outpace traditional Wall Street exchanges on everything from pre-IPO tech stocks to weekend oil trading.
items.title_zh: 专家报告称，Hyperliquid 预测传统交易所开业前 80% 的石油流动
items.summary_zh: 道明证券表示，随着 Hyperliquid 等平台在从首次公开募股前的科技股到周末石油交易等各个方面都超过了传统的华尔街交易所，“永续期货”正在超越加密货币领域。

items.title: Here's how one decentralized cloud provider says private citizens can make money from AI
items.summary: Titan Network says its crowdsourced computing network has signed tech giants like Tencent and Alibaba as clients, saving them as much 75% on AI costs.
items.title_zh: 一家去中心化云提供商表示，普通公民可以通过人工智能赚钱
items.summary_zh: Titan Network 表示，其众包计算网络已签约腾讯和阿里巴巴等科技巨头作为客户，为他们节省了高达 75% 的人工智能成本。

items.title: US sanctions Nobitex and other Iranian crypto exchanges under ‘Economic Fury’ campaign
items.summary: Sanctioned exchange Nobitex handled more than half of Iran's crypto inflows last year, according to the U.S. Treasury.
items.title_zh: 美国在“经济愤怒”运动下制裁 Nobitex 和其他伊朗加密货币交易所
items.summary_zh: 据美国财政部称，去年，受制裁的交易所 Nobitex 处理了伊朗一半以上的加密货币流入。

items.title: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan calls crypto a ‘contrarian bet’
items.summary: Growing AI stocks and uncertainty around the Clarity Act have put crypto in a tough spot for institutional investors, Hougan said.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 首席信息官 Matt Hougan 称加密货币为“逆向赌注”
items.summary_zh: Hougan 表示，不断增长的人工智能股票和围绕《澄清法案》的不确定性使加密货币对机构投资者来说陷入了困境。

items.title: Travelers deploys AI-powered claims countrywide with OpenAI
items.summary: Travelers built an AI-powered Claim Assistant with OpenAI to guide customers through filing claims, provide 24/7 support, and scale operations during peak demand.
items.title_zh: Travelers 通过 OpenAI 在全国范围内部署人工智能支持的索赔
items.summary_zh: Travelers 使用 OpenAI 构建了一个由人工智能驱动的索赔助理，以指导客户提交索赔、提供 24/7 支持并在需求高峰期间扩展运营。

items.title: Codex for every role, tool, and workflow
items.summary: Discover new Codex plugins, sites, and annotations that help analysts, marketers, designers, investors, and other teams get more done with AI.
items.title_zh: 适用于每个角色、工具和工作流程的 Codex

items.title: Advancing youth safety and opportunity through global leadership
items.summary: OpenAI calls for global action on youth AI safety, proposing an international institute to strengthen safeguards, standards, and opportunities for young people.
items.title_zh: 通过全球领导力促进青年安全和机会
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 呼吁针对青年人工智能安全采取全球行动，提议成立一个国际机构来加强对年轻人的保障、标准和机会。

items.title: Our views on AI policy and political advocacy
items.summary: Our approach to AI policy and political advocacy, transparency, support for thoughtful regulation and AI safety, and that no outside political group speaks on the company’s behalf.
items.title_zh: 我们对人工智能政策和政治倡导的看法
items.summary_zh: 我们对人工智能政策和政治宣传的态度、透明度、对深思熟虑的监管和人工智能安全的支持，并且没有外部政治团体代表公司发言。

items.title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
items.summary: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.
items.title_zh: 在密歇根州建设智能时代的基础设施
items.summary_zh: 作为 Stargate 的一部分，OpenAI 在密歇根州破土动工了一个 1GW 的数据中心项目，建设人工智能基础设施以扩大访问范围、创造就业机会并支持社区。

items.title: Boston Children’s uses AI to unlock new diagnoses
items.summary: Boston Children’s Hospital uses OpenAI technology to improve patient care, reduce operational burden, and help diagnose more than 40 rare disease cases.
items.title_zh: 波士顿儿童医院使用人工智能解锁新诊断

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam

items.title: Media Advisory: MIT to establish regional quantum hub
items.summary: With $25 million investment from the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, MIT to build a new shared-use facility to serve as a statewide quantum toolbox.
items.title_zh: 媒体咨询：麻省理工学院将建立区域量子中心
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院获得马萨诸塞州联邦投资 2500 万美元，用于建造一个新的共享设施，作为全州范围内的量子工具箱。

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.
items.title_zh: 贾斯汀·所罗门被任命为工程教育副院长
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars
items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的两名学生被评为 2026 年 Knight-Hennessy 学者
items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.title: Q&A: Expanding MIT’s global reach through Universal Learning
items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。
